ab: harem kana wari tu pilralrangaw mi na sinsi mukuwa i tong-u-yuēn, mutulik mi i salikid cimima’ da kimpu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: musavak mi i tong-u-yuēn mu, marengay na sinsi, i nganguwayan mu, mau na ’aya’ayam, i likudan mu, mau na unaunan, kalrawayu kanmu mena’uwa mu papiya.
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，你們大家隨意參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: makaud ku da unan, semalra adi ku yana’u da unaunan.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: mena’u ku da sadu a ’ayam, kadu i makaics kana kawi muviivii, di mena’u ku da alrupe’ na ’alrecu i makasavak kanantu vuwang na kawi.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: i savak kana tong-u-yuēn ulra na ma’idang na zo, uma di likulraw, adi ku diya mena’u kanani na haramhaman, salaw ku semangal harem kanangku ina’uwan.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，我非常開心今天所看見的。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: semasiyasing ku da sadu na siyasing, pana’u kana malri di nani.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: nu masalr lra mu, marelranga ku lra kana malri di nani duwa kani mena’uwa.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
